items.name: D.E.G Steel Carnage Backpack (HRUNTING VARIANT)
items.description:
(DISCLAIMER: This is M.U.I sized, not intended to be worn by itself. Must be worn with full set to have the full look, certain parts must be adjusted like the arms down. Upper body moved forward a little bit, and the lower body moved down a little bit.)

A peculiar piece of history only known to few who have seen it in action. 

While only one variant remains in existence, it was based off data that should've never been recovered. 

Tread lightly around this one.

items.name: Witch's White Alchemical Backpack [3.0]
items.description: Embark on magical journeys with the Witch's Alchemical Backpack! This intricately designed backpack features beautifully carved leather, glowing runes, and mystical symbols. Adorned with enchanted mushrooms, glowing crystals, and vibrant foliage, it's perfect for those who explore both mystical realms and natural wonders. Carry all your essential items while showcasing a unique blend of magic and craftsmanship. Ideal for any adventurer with a touch of the arcane in their heart.
